title: orthosiphon teucriifolius
intro: Orthosiphon teucriifolius, also known as Miswak or Utahna, is a plant species belonging to the family Lamiaceae, native to the tropical regions of Asia and Australia. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, diuretic, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Orthosiphon teucriifolius include its ability to treat urinary tract infections, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of kidney stones, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. Orthosiphon teucriifolius is commonly used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and extracts, which are often used to treat various health conditions and promote overall well-being.
